principle: short drama and comic generation are downstream product capabilities, not the boundary of the base model foundation

capabilities.name: 复杂推理与任务分解

capabilities.name: 代码理解、生成、修改和项目执行

capabilities.name: 工具调用和函数调用
capabilities.next_step: 定义工具 schema、调用协议和安全边界

capabilities.name: Skill、插件和 MCP 扩展系统

capabilities.name: RAG、知识库和长期记忆

capabilities.name: 视觉理解
capabilities.next_step: 接入图片输入、视觉 processor、图像评测和角色一致性能力

capabilities.name: 语音识别与语音合成

capabilities.name: 图文音视频统一多模态
